body:
The status quo of American health care is unacceptable.
#

**The status quo of American health care is unacceptable. We need Medicare for All NOW.**
Yesterday I joined with over 100 other House Democrats to reintroduce a bill that would extend high-quality health care to all Americans.
**[Add your name to our petition if you’re all in for Medicare for All. No one should have to go without health insurance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26558437/277328601/-1092857670?refcode2=6977e02f-998a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210321-2-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc3ZTAyZi05OThhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1ZZFx8JKVkd_A39qpA0xGkr7vw7lYVdxrijLDd61L0=&emci=b01969aa-598a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=6977e02f-998a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=24719896)**
This fight is personal to me. Unlike most of Congress, I know what it’s like to go without health insurance. I understand having to choose between seeking medical care or toughing it out because you can’t afford it.
Especially given how our communities have been impacted by COVID-19, it’s no secret that we need universal health care in this country. The American Rescue Plan covers the cost of COBRA’s short-term health insurance for people who have recently lost their jobs. That’s an important provision, but if we already had a single-payer, Medicare for All healthcare system in place, it would have cost millions of dollars less to keep people insured.
**[Enough is enough. I won’t stop fighting until every American has high-quality health care, regardless of their income or employment status. Please join me in this fight for Medicare for All by signing your name to our petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26558438/277328603/-1092857670?refcode2=6977e02f-998a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210321-2-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc3ZTAyZi05OThhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1ZZFx8JKVkd_A39qpA0xGkr7vw7lYVdxrijLDd61L0=&emci=b01969aa-598a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=6977e02f-998a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=24719896)**
Together we can change this country for the better, but we can only do it if we stand up as a collective and say enough is enough.
Onward,
Mondaire
